tool.name: subdomain_enum
tool.description: Enumerate subdomains for a target domain.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Full subdomain enumeration with wordlist - Check if a specific subdomain exists - Get common subdomain wordlist - Wildcard DNS detection and filtering

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The enumeration action: - enumerate: Full subdomain enumeration with wordlist - check: Check if a specific subdomain exists - wordlist: List available wordlist entries

parameter.name: subdomain
parameter.description: Specific subdomain to check. Required for check action.

returns.description: Enumeration results including found subdomains and their IP addresses

tool.examples:
# Enumerate subdomains
enumerate example.com
# Check specific subdomain
check example.com www
# Get wordlist
wordlist example.com
